art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 has opened at HKCEC, showing strong sales of works by Picasso and Liu Ye, with notable interest in Korean artists like Lee Bul and Kim Yun-shin.
top_stories: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 general admission opens at HKCEC with 240 galleries from 41 countries.
Strong sales reported for Picasso and Liu Ye; notable collector interest in Lee Bul and Kim Yun-shin.
New curation platform 'Echoes' and digital section 'Zero 10' debut at Art Basel Hong Kong.

stock_market.summary: US stock futures show a modest rise with US500 gaining 0.45% amid geopolitical developments and cautious investor sentiment.
key_factors: Geopolitical tensions impacting global market sentiment.
Future Money Acquisition Corp (FMACU) IPO launches on Nasdaq.
Fragile recovery observed in emerging equity markets despite recent rallies.
